calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-15-2026 Continued To Jul-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicholas Jellins appeared via zoom for Cassonja Wiley (petitioner).

Mr, Jellins stated that this was a large heir search, that they are still in the process of collecting information.

The matter is continued to July 22, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

The Court ordered counsel to file a final distribution or report status of administration 5 days prior to the hearing.

Judge:Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-03-2026 Continued To Apr-15-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicholas Jellins appeared via zoom for Melverdia Davis (petitioner).

Mr. Jellins stated that he is still working on the final distribution, that there almost 170 beneficiaries in this matter, and that he is requesting more time to complete the filing. The matter is continued to April 15, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Obitinalla. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-02-2025 Continued To Feb-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Nicholas Jellins, for Melverdia Davis, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel offers a status of a petition and requests a continuance to finalize and file a petition.

The subject matter is continued to Feb-03-2026 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 204 as confirmed in open court.

Judge: Hon. Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Ramirez. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-28-2025 Continued To Dec-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Nicholas Jellins appeared via zoom for Cassonja Wiley (petitioner).

Mr. Jellins requested a brief continuance to file his petition for final distribution. The matter is continued to December 2, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Funds To Be In A Blocked Account. Stats Of Filing And Deposit Into A Blocked Account Is Set For 5/27/2025.
Off Calendar Sep-30-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-30-2025 Continued To Oct-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Nicholas Jellins appeared via zoom for Cassonja Wiley (Administrator).

Mr. Jellins stated that is took several months for chase bank to get back to him, and that the petition should be ready within a week to file. The matter is continued to October 28, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Final Account And Report From The Resigning Administrator
Off Calendar Sep-10-2024 Continued To Oct-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Limited Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicholas Jellins appeared by zoom for Melverdia Davis (resigning personal representative) and for Cassonja Wiley (petitioner).

Mr. Jellins stated that he concurs with the court to take the current report on status of administration off calendar as the final report will contain all of the required information. Mr. Jellins also asked the court to grant the petition for resignation and the petition for appointment, stated that the estate assets have been liquidated, that he asked for limited authority because until the funds are distributed, there is no need for the petitioner to have any direct involvement with the funds and asked the court not to require a bond, or to put the funds in a blocked account. The court reminded Mr. Jellins that it discourages the use of blocked accounts on orders of appointment. Mr. Jellins stated that his client has not applied for a bond, but he does not see any reason why she wouldn't qualify, that there are 164 heirs, that many addresses need to be revised and they need to find them, that they are trying to communicate with the adult who is caring for the minor beneficiary (Sheila Foster) and that they may need to have a guardian ad litem appointed for the minor. In addition, Mr. Jellins stated that notice has not been sent to the minor directly and that he hopes to sort out the address issue regarding Tryon Nunley and Terrence Caper. The report on status of administration is off calendar. The Petition for Leave to Resign is under submission with the court's intent to grant. Status on filing of a final account and report from the resigning administrator is set for September 10, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Letters of Administration is also under submission. The court will think about the issue of bond, or a blocked account.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-05-2023 Continued To Oct-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicholas P. Jellins, via Zoom, for and with Melverdia Davis, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Ms. Davis that the decedent was not survived by a domestic partner and that there is no issue of a predeceased child. The court indicates an issue of failure to provide notice to Ean Foster and waives that issue as to this petition only. The court confirms that a petition to determine entitlement will need to be filed before final distribution can be granted. Counsel advises that the real property sold last Thursday, and the remaining asset is all cash. The court advises that it intends to require a bond of just over one million dollars. Counsel advises that he intends to file a petition to reduce the bond.

After additional discussion, the court confirms that there are no appearances to object. There being no objections, the court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Melverdia Davis is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $1,010,000. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Sep-05-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by Aug-25-2023, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
